field.label: Account ID
field.help: Cloudflare Account ID (32 hex characters, found in Cloudflare dashboard)

field.label: Team Name
field.help: Cloudflare Zero Trust team name (e.g. mycompany for mycompany.cloudflareaccess.com)

field.label: API Token
field.help: Cloudflare API token with Zero Trust permissions. Stored encrypted, not visible after save.
